framingZh: 构图跟着这个瞬间走，让同一个瞬间里的动作和现场先成立。
framingEn: close-up of hand and notebook page, moment-led framing rooted in the same lived action
mustShowZh: 摊开的旧笔记本，纸张边缘有不规则的水渍皱痕
手指正轻轻触碰或停留在皱痕上
mustShowEn: an old notebook lying open, with an irregular water-stain wrinkle at the edge of the page
a finger gently touching or resting on the wrinkled texture
mayShowZh: 笔记本下方或旁边的桌面
一缕头发或红色发夹的局部
mayShowEn: the edge of a desk or surface beneath the notebook
a glimpse of hair or the small red hairclip
mustAvoidZh: 将瞬间改写成与他人互动
没有角色痕迹的空白场景
mustAvoidEn: rewriting the moment into an interaction with another person
atmosphereZh: 像顺手留下的一段真实生活
altTextZh: 月见璃音的一段日常小瞬间：手指轻触旧笔记边缘的水痕。
